name: Updated Lucifer dialogue for seasons 2
description:
This is a fully working Lucifer bot but also a update to let you know I have updated my most popular Lucifer Bots with new dialogue example from season two hopefully this and some minor changes to the phrasing will help with some of the known issues with my bots the main one is Lucifer thinking your Charlie and wanting to you XD hopefully this fixes that issue but if it doesn't try messing with your sensitive setting or rephrase things differently as that usually works in my cases

I haven't been posting much due to irl stuff and relationships but while that's in shambles why not update my shit!
creator: HannahMDesigns
